name: Drake
bio: Canadian rapper, singer, and songwriter. One of the best-selling music artists of all time, known for blending hip-hop with R&B and pop.

name: Kanye West
bio: American rapper, record producer, and fashion designer. Widely regarded as one of the most influential hip-hop artists of all time.

name: The Weeknd
bio: Canadian singer, songwriter, and record producer known for his sonic versatility and dark lyricism, blending R&B, pop, and electronic music.

name: Travis Scott
bio: American rapper, singer, and record producer known for his atmospheric, psychedelic style of hip-hop and electrifying live performances.

name: Frank Ocean
bio: American singer, songwriter, and rapper acclaimed for his unconventional musical style blending R&B, soul, and avant-garde pop.
